circular.title: Master Circular – Housing Finance
applicable_to: All Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding Regional Rural Banks)
circular.summary: This Master Circular consolidates the regulatory framework for housing finance provided by Scheduled Commercial Banks, outlining permissible lending activities and mandating strict adherence to Loan-to-Value ratios and risk weights. It incorporates judicial directives from the Delhi and Bombay High Courts regarding unauthorized construction and disclosure requirements for builders. The circular aims to prevent real estate speculation, ensure consumer protection, and maintain credit discipline.

clauses.text: Banks occupy a strategic position in the financial system and play an important role in providing credit to the housing sector.
clauses.summary: Introduction to the role of banks in housing finance

clauses.text: Bank credit is used for production and construction activities and not for activities connected with speculation in real estate.
clauses.summary: Prohibition on using bank credit for real estate speculation

clauses.text: Bank finance can be granted only for purchase of a plot, provided a declaration is obtained from the borrower that he intends to construct a house on the said plot within such period as may be laid down by the banks.
clauses.summary: Condition for granting bank finance for land purchase

clauses.text: Banks may grant loans for purchase/construction of dwelling units and repairs.
clauses.summary: Permissible lending activities for construction and purchase of dwelling units

obligations.text: Obtain a declaration from the borrower of intent to construct a house within a specified period for land purchase loans.
obligations.plain_english: Get a declaration from the borrower to build a house within a certain time for land purchase loans

obligations.text: Verify sanctioned plans and obtain an affidavit-cum-undertaking from borrowers to ensure construction follows approved plans.
obligations.plain_english: Verify approved plans and get an undertaking from borrowers to ensure construction follows the plans

obligations.text: Appoint an Architect to certify various stages of construction and completion.
obligations.plain_english: Appoint an Architect to certify construction stages and completion

obligations.text: Ensure LTV ratios and Risk Weights are maintained as per the prescribed limits (e.g., LTV ≤ 80% for loans up to ₹30 lakh).
obligations.plain_english: Maintain LTV ratios and Risk Weights within prescribed limits

obligations.text: Prohibit the levy of foreclosure charges or prepayment penalties on floating rate home loans.
obligations.plain_english: Do not charge foreclosure charges or prepayment penalties on floating rate home loans

obligations.text: Provide a Key Facts Statement (KFS) for all housing loans as per the April 15, 2024 instructions.
obligations.plain_english: Provide a Key Facts Statement for all housing loans

obligations.text: Ensure builders disclose the name of the mortgagee bank in all marketing pamphlets and brochures.
obligations.plain_english: Ensure builders disclose the mortgagee bank's name in marketing materials

obligations.text: Link loan disbursal to the stages of construction; prohibit upfront lump-sum disbursal for incomplete/greenfield projects.
obligations.plain_english: Link loan disbursal to construction stages and prohibit upfront lump-sum disbursal

obligations.text: Adhere to the National Building Code (NBC) for building safety and incorporate it into loan policies.
obligations.plain_english: Adhere to the National Building Code for building safety

obligations.text: Limit supplementary finance for repairs/additions to ₹10 lakh in metropolitan centers and ₹6 lakh in other centers.

prohibitions.text: Bank credit is used for production and construction activities and not for activities connected with speculation in real estate.
prohibitions.plain_english: Do not use bank credit for real estate speculation

prohibitions.text: No loan should be given for properties in unauthorized colonies until regularized.
prohibitions.plain_english: Do not give loans for properties in unauthorized colonies

prohibitions.text: No loan for residential properties intended for commercial use.
prohibitions.plain_english: Do not give loans for residential properties intended for commercial use

penalties.condition: Failure to verify sanctioned plans and obtain an affidavit-cum-undertaking from borrowers
Failure to ensure builders disclose the name of the mortgagee bank in all marketing pamphlets and brochures

definitions.plain_english: The ratio of the loan amount to the value of the property

definitions.definition: The weight assigned to a loan based on its risk
definitions.plain_english: A measure of the risk associated with a loan
